title: Reinventing Entropy | Compression is Intelligence Part 1
summary: 3Blue1Brown presents a visual exploration of entropy, compression, and information through the lens of Shannon's mathematical theory. The video examines the fundamental compressibility of language and connects compression to intelligence, drawing on classical information theory and modern visualizations.
